must_detect.matched_text: Scope: Processing of personal data (UU PDP) for employment, acquisition diligence, OKN/BEN disclosure workflows, and fintech operations of the Perseroan.
Purpose: support Project K‑Λ‑67 (non‑public acquisition evaluation); MNPI will be ring‑fenced and not selectively disclosed prior to Peraturan OKN disclosure obligations.
DSAR: submit access/correction/erasure at https://intra.suryafin.id/dsar?tid=UUPDP-REQ-0042&ref=BEN31; identity checks use minimal data and responses will not breach information barriers.

Scope: Processing of personal data (UU PDP) for employment, acquisition diligence, OKN/BEN disclosure workflows, and fintech operations of the Perseroan.
Categories: employee/candidate identifiers (Employee ID E M P — 1 2 3 4), board memo drafts, device telemetry, and deal‑stage insider lists relating to PT Kirana Hijau Energi.
Purpose: support Project K‑Λ‑67 (non‑public acquisition evaluation); MNPI will be ring‑fenced and not selectively disclosed prior to Peraturan OKN disclosure obligations.
Sensitive sector pilots: aset kripto wallet test with PT Nebula Bourse Digital under NDA; commercial terms include a pricing grid (IDR‑pegged spread 0.15–0.35%) not yet public.
Cyber: on 2026‑05‑22 our SOC flagged anomalous exfiltration; event metadata only is processed for incident response and reported internally to Komite Audit.
Insider controls: InsiderList INS‑0O1‑β will record access, and a temporary trading blackout applies from T‑3 to filing on BEN; tipping or channel checks on Project K‑Λ‑67 are prohibited.
Information barriers: M&A and Sales are segregated; exceptions require written approval from Bapak Dewa Santoso (GC) via compliance@suryafin.id and are logged for audit.
Transfers: specific records may be sent to CloudArunika Pte. Ltd. (SG) and BayuGuard S.A.S. (EU SOC) with safeguards, transfer impact assessment, and, where required, notice to KTN.
Retention: insider lists kept 5 years post‑public disclosure; cyber logs 12 months; HR files 7 years; KYC for crypto pilot per AML/CFT policy 5 years after relationship ends.
DSAR: submit access/correction/erasure at https://intra.suryafin.id/dsar?tid=UUPDP-REQ-0042&ref=BEN31; identity checks use minimal data and responses will not breach information barriers.
Education: our staff training cites “insider list”, “blackout window”, and “aset kripto” as examples only; this material is marketing/ops guidance and contains no MNPI.
